summary: The Pairing Omics Data Platform is a web application for storing paired omics data projects.
After project submission, the project will be reviewed and if approved will appear in the list of projects.

Version 0.2.0 added an intro page. Version 0.2.0 added a password protected review section to review pending projects. Version 0.2.0 added a page with a list of projects. Version 0.2.0 added a page to show single projects. Version 0.2.0 add
